productDisplayName: Reebok Men's Game Trainer White Shoe
description: The reebok Game Trainer is designed to take your performance to the next level. This pair is a great mix of comfort and style. Team it with performance clothes and watch your performance levels rising.Upper Mesh and synthetic upper with synthetic overlays for breathability and structure Mesh tongue and collar with textile lining for excellent snug Fit PlayDry moisture wicking lining to keep the feet dry Brand logo on the sides increase style and act as reinforcements Lace-ups for snug, customised fit Brand name appliqued on the tongue and printed on the back Midsole Removable footbed that can be replaced with an orthotic DMX Ride technology provides superior cushioning EVA midsole for greater durability and comfort Outsole High-abrasion rubber outsole for increased durability Flex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feet Multi-directional lugs on the outsole for excellent grip Reinforced bridge on the midsole allows for greater stability Rubber outsole extended to the toe box and heel and embedded onto it for durability and forefoot protection shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
